// note: Copy to ~/.pi/agent/mcp.json (global) or .pi/mcp.json (project). This wires Pi's LLM directly to the remote Librarian MCP server, exposing the memory + session tools (recall, remember, verify_memory, start_session, ...). The extension drives the session LIFECYCLE deterministically and does not need this; this is purely so the model can call memory tools. Requires LIBRARIAN_MCP_URL and LIBRARIAN_AGENT_TOKEN in the environment.
